discord.welcome_pin:
**Welcome to the {brand_name}!**

**:package: Get started**

This is a modded Minecraft 1.21.1 server with loads of mods focused on exploration and adventuring.

Here's what to do:

**1. Register your Minecraft username**
In the `Message #general` box, type out `/register` and then enter your Minecraft username. You can get this from the [Minecraft account](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/msaprofile) page, just click on `Change Profile Name` and then it is displayed as `Current Java Profile Name`. Copy it exactly, it's case sensitive.

You can undo this with `/unregister`.

**2. Get the Player role**
Ask an {admin_role} to give you the {player_role} role and then you'll be added to the allow-list automatically.

**3. Set up a client with our modpack and join the server**
Install [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/) (free), then grab the **one-click instance** from the pack page - everything comes pre-configured, and the pack **updates itself automatically every time you play**, so you never need to redo this. Add your Microsoft account in Prism, double-click the instance, and it'll connect you straight to the server.

Full instructions (and a manual setup option) are on the pack page.

**Useful links**

:map: [Map](https://map.{domain})
:bar_chart: [Status](https://status.{domain})
:fire: [Mods](https://mods.{domain})
:arrow_down: [Instructions](https://pack.{domain})

Modpack updates happen automatically - if an admin announces new mods, just restart your game.

Something broken or got an idea? Ping an {admin_role}.
